normal: Sorry [TARGET], I won't be able to come in today — I've had a sudden high fever and splitting headache since early this morning.
Good morning [TARGET], I'm going to be late today because I had to handle an urgent family document that absolutely couldn't be postponed.
Apologies [TARGET], I need to take the day off to accompany a close family member who fell suddenly ill and needs to go to the hospital.
Hi [TARGET], I'm not feeling well at all today — nausea and dizziness since last night. I'll need to rest and see a doctor.
Sorry [TARGET], my car won't start this morning. I'm waiting for roadside assistance and will update you as soon as I know my ETA.

ridiculous: My sincerest apologies [TARGET], but my cat had an emotional breakdown this morning after failing to catch a lizard. I can't in good conscience leave during her recovery.
Hi [TARGET], I'm locked out of my own house because my keys accidentally left with my spouse, and I'm standing outside without my wallet or shoes.
Sorry [TARGET], my tire went flat in the most mysterious way imaginable, and the only repair guy nearby insisted on a lengthy philosophical debate about the meaning of life before touching my wheel.
Hey [TARGET], I accidentally wore two different shoes to the bus stop, went home to fix it, and somehow ended up rearranging my entire wardrobe. I lost track of time.

Apologies [TARGET], I made the mistake of reading 'just one more' motivational tweet this morning and fell into a 3-hour rabbit hole of self-improvement videos. I'm a changed person but I'm also very late.
Sorry [TARGET], I can't come to work today because my motorcycle keys were hidden by a crow, and it's demanding peanuts as ransom.

realityBending: Sorry boss [TARGET], I was forcibly recruited by interdimensional agents to repair a space-time leak in 2045. I should be back in this timeline by tomorrow, maybe.
Hi [TARGET], please understand I can't come in because my entire neighborhood has spontaneously become a zero-gravity zone. I'm currently floating near the ceiling waiting for a cosmic rescue team.
Apologies [TARGET], I got trapped inside my own dream simulation and can only wake up fully once I complete a secret level-99 dungeon. The final boss is a spreadsheet.
Hey [TARGET], a rogue AI briefly achieved sentience this morning and elected me as its legal guardian. I'm currently in negotiation proceedings. HR may want to update the leave policy.

Sorry [TARGET], I accidentally stepped into a temporal anomaly while making coffee. I've already lived today three times and I still keep being late, so clearly the universe is against me attending work.
